title: Epiks Default pvp pack
description: If you like the classic and normal look of the game, and don't want too much changes, then this pack is just for you!
body:
This texture pack makes items to fit the pvp style of vanilla! Here is are some examples:![All items that has been changed they look really like vanilla, but way better!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2227f01bb3a33ad69a95bbe049199b71f74afcf1.png)
Here - take a look at the swords!![They are short, and not covering a lot of area on your screen!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d48c13b3fa9052d346dbc731036fe57b6024e569.png)
Or take a look at the bow![The bow has now an actual looking arrow from the game, and not some stick with iron on it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f3c0f880962fd2d10b907d0860f85b96e67ee1a.png)

Other item have been changed, recolored, ect.
That's all! Hope you enjoy the pack.
